'''polashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:stablike|stablike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-l-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stablike|stablike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| polashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:polashithi|polashithi]] || [[word:polashiji|polashiji]] || [[word:polashishi|polashishi]] || [[word:polashiki|polashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:polashuthuthu|polashuthuthu]] || [[word:polashujuju|polashujuju]] || [[word:polashushushu|polashushushu]] || [[word:polashukuku|polashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:polashuthu|polashuthu]] || [[word:polashuju|polashuju]] || [[word:polashushu|polashushu]] || [[word:polashuku|polashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:polashufthuf|polashufthuf]] || [[word:polashufjuf|polashufjuf]] || [[word:polashufshuf|polashufshuf]] || [[word:polashufkuf|polashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:polashethe|polashethe]] || [[word:polasheje|polasheje]] || [[word:polasheshe|polasheshe]] || [[word:polasheke|polasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:polashothotho|polashothotho]] || [[word:polashojojo|polashojojo]] || [[word:polashoshosho|polashoshosho]] || [[word:polashokoko|polashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:polashotho|polashotho]] || [[word:polashojo|polashojo]] || [[word:polashosho|polashosho]] || [[word:polashoko|polashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:polashofthof|polashofthof]] || [[word:polashofjof|polashofjof]] || [[word:polashofshof|polashofshof]] || [[word:polashofkof|polashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:polashĂŻfthĂŻf|polashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:polashĂŻfjĂŻf|polashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:polashĂŻfshĂŻf|polashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:polashĂŻfkĂŻf|polashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:polashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|polashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:polashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|polashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:polashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|polashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:polashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|polashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:polashĂŻfthĂŻf|polashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:polashĂŻfjĂŻf|polashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:polashĂŻfshĂŻf|polashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:polashĂŻfkĂŻf|polashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:polashĂŻfthĂŻf|polashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:polashĂŻfjĂŻf|polashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:polashĂŻfshĂŻf|polashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:polashĂŻfkĂŻf|polashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:polashĂŠthĂŠ|polashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:polashĂŠjĂŠ|polashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:polashĂŠshĂŠ|polashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:polashĂŠkĂŠ|polashĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:polashathatha|polashathatha]] || [[word:polashajaja|polashajaja]] || [[word:polashashasha|polashashasha]] || [[word:polashakaka|polashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:polashatha|polashatha]] || [[word:polashaja|polashaja]] || [[word:polashasha|polashasha]] || [[word:polashaka|polashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:polashafthaf|polashafthaf]] || [[word:polashafjaf|polashafjaf]] || [[word:polashafshaf|polashafshaf]] || [[word:polashafkaf|polashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:polashasha|polashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:polashĂ«sha|polashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:polashrosha|polashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:polashmusha|polashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:polashyasha|polashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopolashnkshĂ«sha|gopolashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopolashnkrosha|gopolashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopolashnkmusha|gopolashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopolashnkyasha|gopolashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:polalashasha|polalashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:polalashĂ«sha|polalashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:polalashrosha|polalashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:polalashmusha|polalashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:polalashyasha|polalashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopolalashnkshĂ«sha|gopolalashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopolalashnkrosha|gopolalashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopolalashnkmusha|gopolalashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopolalashnkyasha|gopolalashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:pelĂŠshasha|pelĂŠshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pelĂŠshĂ«sha|pelĂŠshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pelĂŠshrosha|pelĂŠshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pelĂŠshmusha|pelĂŠshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pelĂŠshyasha|pelĂŠshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopelĂŠshnkshĂ«sha|gopelĂŠshnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopelĂŠshnkrosha|gopelĂŠshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopelĂŠshnkmusha|gopelĂŠshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopelĂŠshnkyasha|gopelĂŠshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:polfashasha|polfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:polfashĂ«sha|polfashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:polfashrosha|polfashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:polfashmusha|polfashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:polfashyasha|polfashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopolfashnkshĂ«sha|gopolfashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopolfashnkrosha|gopolfashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopolfashnkmusha|gopolfashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopolfashnkyasha|gopolfashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
